name: Raspberry Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the thawed raspberries in a blender or food processor.
2. Pour the puree into a fine strainer. Use the back of a spoon to press it through the strainer into a large bowl, discarding the seeds. Set aside.
3. Beat the eggs and sugar in a blender or food processor until smooth.
4. Stir the egg mixture, lemon juice, and half and half into the raspberry puree until well blended.
5. Pour the mixture into an ice cream canister.
6. Freeze according to the manufacturer's directions for your specific ice cream maker. Makes 2 quarts.
